korean_title: 외국어 시장 신호 — 한국어 요약 대기
korean_summary: 규칙 기반 수집 단계에서는 번역을 추정하지 않습니다. 원문과 출처를 보존했습니다.

title: Save as/Clone/Copy/Create from Template on bpmn files
summary: Currently there is no way to easily create a new process based on an existing one. Only workaround right now is to download the file, open it to change the collaboration id, and upload it again, which is tedious. Please add a function to create a new bpmn file from an existing one. Ideally, it directly asks for the new process ID and Name too so that users don't forget to change it.
original_title: Save as/Clone/Copy/Create from Template on bpmn files
